title: Oxydectes lucida

The Melastomataceae family consists of approximately 170 genera and over 5,000 species. Oxydectes lucida is a species of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Its classification is further divided into the order Myrtales and the class Magnoliopsida.
